const presentDialog: PresentDialogFn = useCallback(
    (props) =>
      present({
        title: props.title || ' ',
        content: props.content,
        clickOutsideToDismiss: props.clickOutsideToDismiss,
        modalClassName: props.className,
        contentClassName: 'p-0 -mx-2',
      }),
    [present],
  )

This may or may not be related to the current task.</ide_selection>

改成 使用 @apps/web/src/components/modules/peek/PeekModal.tsx 的形式

```text
    31→const fallbackSerifFont =
    32→  "'Noto Serif CJK SC', 'Noto Serif SC', var(--app-font-serif, 'Source Han Serif SC'), 'Source Han Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif', source-han-serif-sc, SongTi SC, SimSum, 'Hiragino Sans GB', system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, 'Microsoft YaHei', 'WenQuanYi Micro Hei', sans-serif"
    33→const fallbackMonoFont =
    34→  "'OperatorMonoSSmLig Nerd Font', 'Cascadia Code PL', 'FantasqueSansMono Nerd Font', 'operator mono', JetBrainsMono, 'Fira code Retina', 'Fira code', Consolas, Monaco, 'Hannotate SC', monospace, -apple-system"
    35→
    36→const linkCardFetchContext: LinkCardFetchContext = {
    37→  adapters: {
    38→    github: {
    39→      request: fetchGitHubApi,
    40→    },
    41→    tmdb: {
    42→      request: async (url) => {
    43→        const u = new URL(url)
    44→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/3\//, '')
    45→        const r = await fetch(`/api/tmdb/${path}${u.search}`)
    46→        return await r.json()
    47→      },
    48→    },
    49→    bangumi: {
    50→      request: async (url) => {
    51→        const u = new URL(url)
    52→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/v0\//, '')
    53→        const r = await fetch(`/api/bangumi/${path}`)
    54→        return await r.json()
    55→      },
    56→    },
    57→    leetcode: {
    58→      request: async (_url, init) => {
    59→        const r = await fetch('/api/leetcode', init)
    60→        return await r.json()
    61→      },
    62→    },
    63→    'netease-music': {
    64→      request: async (url) => {
    65→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    66→        const r = await fetch('/api/music/netease', {
    67→          method: 'POST',
    68→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    69→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    70→        })
    71→        return await r.json()
    72→      },
    73→    },
    74→    'qq-music': {
    75→      request: async (url) => {
    76→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    77→        const r = await fetch('/api/music/tencent', {
    78→          method: 'POST',
    79→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    80→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    81→        })
    82→        return await r.json()
    83→      },
    84→    },
    85→    'mx-space': {
    86→      request: async (path) => {
    87→        const r = await fetch(`/api/v2/${path}`)
    88→        return await r.json()
    89→      },
    90→    },
    91→  },
    92→}
    93→
    94→function LinkCardWithMxSpace(props: EnhancedLinkCardProps) {
    95→  const webUrl = getWebUrl()
    96→  const plugins = useMemo(() => {
    97→    if (!webUrl) return
    98→    return [createMxSpacePlugin({ webUrl })]
    99→  }, [webUrl])
   100→  return <LinkCardRenderer {...props} plugins={plugins} />
   101→}
   102→
   103→const customRendererConfig: Partial<RendererConfig> = {
   104→  LinkCard: LinkCardWithMxSpace,
   105→}
   106→
   107→export interface LexicalContentProps {
   108→  className?: string
   109→  content: string
   110→  variant?: RichEditorVariant
   111→}
   112→
   113→export function LexicalContent({
   114→  content,
   115→  variant,
   116→  className,
   117→}: LexicalContentProps) {
   118→  const editorState = useMemo<SerializedEditorState | null>(() => {
   119→    try {
   120→      return JSON.parse(content)
   121→    } catch {
   122→      return null
   123→    }
   124→  }, [content])
   125→
   126→  const isDark = useIsDark()
   127→  const { present } = useModalStack()
   128→  const presentDialog: PresentDialogFn = useCallback(
   129→    (props) =>
   130→      present({
   131→        title: props.title || ' ',
   132→        content: props.content,
   133→        clickOutsideToDismiss: props.clickOutsideToDismiss,
   134→        modalClassName: props.className,
   135→        contentClassName: 'p-0 -mx-2',
   136→      }),
   137→    [present],
   138→  )
   139→
   140→  const baseVarStyle = useMemo(
   141→    () =>
   142→      ({
   143→        '--font-sans': fallbackSansFont,
   144→        '--font-serif': fallbackSerifFont,
   145→        '--font-mono': fallbackMonoFont,
   146→      }) as React.CSSProperties,
   147→    [],
   148→  )
   149→
   150→  const editorOverrideStyle = useMemo(
   151→    () =>
   152→      createThemeStyle({
   153→        color: {
   154→          accent: 'var(--color-accent, #33a6b8)',
   155→          link: 'var(--color-accent, #33a6b8)',
   156→          accentLight:
   157→            'color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 20%, transparent)',
   158→          quoteBorder: 'var(--color-accent, #33a6b8)',
   159→        },
   160→        layout: { maxWidth: '100%' },
   161→        typography: {
   162→          fontFamily:
   163→            variant === 'note'
   164→              ? `var(--note-font-override, ${fallbackSerifFont})`
   165→              : fallbackSansFont,
   166→          fontFamilySerif: fallbackSerifFont,
   167→          fontMono: fallbackMonoFont,
   168→        },
   169→      }),
   170→    [variant],
   171→  )
   172→
   173→  if (!editorState) return null
   174→
   175→  return (
   176→    <PresentDialogProvider value={presentDialog}>
   177→      <LinkCardFetchProvider value={linkCardFetchContext}>
   178→        <ShiroRenderer
   179→          className={clsx(className, 'bg-transparent!')}
   180→          rendererConfig={customRendererConfig}
   181→          style={{ ...baseVarStyle, ...editorOverrideStyle }}
   182→          theme={isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'}
   183→          value={editorState}
   184→          variant={variant}
   185→        />
   186→      </LinkCardFetchProvider>
   187→    </PresentDialogProvider>
   188→  )
   189→}
   190→
```

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/peek/usePeek.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     4→import { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
     5→
     6→import { PeekModal } from './PeekModal'
     7→
     8→export const usePeek = () => {
     9→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    10→  const { present } = useModalStack()
    11→  return useCallback(
    12→    (href: string) => {
    13→      if (isMobile) return
    14→      const basePresentProps = {
    15→        clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
    16→        overlay: true,
    17→        title: 'Preview',
    18→        modalClassName:
    19→          'relative mx-auto mt-[10vh] scrollbar-none max-w-full overflow-auto px-2 lg:max-w-[65rem] lg:p-0',
    20→      }
    21→
    22→      if (href.startsWith('/notes/')) {
    23→        requestAnimationFrame(async () => {
    24→          const NotePreview = await import('./NotePreview').then(
    25→            (module) => module.NotePreview,
    26→          )
    27→          present({
    28→            ...basePresentProps,
    29→
    30→            CustomModalComponent: () => (
    31→              <PeekModal to={href}>
    32→                <NotePreview noteId={Number.parseInt(href.split('/').pop()!)} />
    33→              </PeekModal>
    34→            ),
    35→            content: () => null,
    36→          })
    37→        })
    38→
    39→        return true
    40→      } else if (href.startsWith('/posts/')) {
    41→        requestAnimationFrame(async () => {
    42→          const PostPreview = await import('./PostPreview').then(
    43→            (module) => module.PostPreview,
    44→          )
    45→          const splitpath = href.split('/')
    46→          const slug = splitpath.pop()!
    47→          const category = splitpath.pop()!
    48→          present({
    49→            ...basePresentProps,
    50→            CustomModalComponent: () => (
    51→              <PeekModal to={href}>
    52→                <PostPreview category={category} slug={slug} />
    53→              </PeekModal>
    54→            ),
    55→            content: () => null,
    56→          })
    57→        })
    58→        return true
    59→      }
    60→
    61→      return false
    62→    },
    63→    [isMobile, present],
    64→  )
    65→}
    66→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
import { FC, ReactNode } from 'react';
export interface PresentDialogProps {
    className?: string;
    clickOutsideToDismiss?: boolean;
    content: FC<{
        dismiss: () => void;
    }>;
    description?: ReactNode;
    portalClassName?: string;
    sheet?: boolean | 'auto';
    showCloseButton?: boolean;
    theme?: 'light' | 'dark';
    title?: ReactNode;
}
export type PresentDialogFn = (props: PresentDialogProps) => (() => void) | void;
export declare const PresentDialogProvider: import('react').Provider<PresentDialogFn | null>;
export declare function usePresentDialog(): PresentDialogFn | null;
//# sourceMappingURL=PresentDialogContext.d.ts.map
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the full picture:

1. `PresentDialogFn` takes `PresentDialogProps` which includes `content: FC<{ dismiss: () => void }>`, `title`, `className`, `clickOutsideToDismiss`, etc.
2. The current implementation uses `useModalStack().present()` to show a regular modal.
3. The user wants to change this to use the `PeekModal` pattern instead, similar to how `usePeek.tsx` works.

Looking at `usePeek.tsx`, the PeekModal pattern uses:
- `CustomModalComponent` wrapping content in `<PeekModal to={href}>...</PeekModal>`


- `content: () => null`
- `clickOutsideToDismiss: true`
- `overlay: true`

But here's the problem: `PresentDialogFn` is called from haklex's editor when previewing nested documents, and the `content` prop is a component that receives a dismiss function. The `PeekModal` requires a `to` prop with a URL, but when called from haklex for nested document previews, there might not be a URL available. I need to figure out what the nested document preview actually needs here.

Looking at the user's constraint that "only one scenario shows the modal—previewing nested documents," I think the solution is to wrap a custom modal component inside `present()` instead of passing modal properties directly. The tricky part is the `to` prop for `PeekModal`—it's meant for the fullscreen navigation button, but a nested document preview might not have a meaningful URL to navigate to. Let me reconsider what the user is actually asking for with the `presentDialog` callback change.

So the goal is to adopt PeekModal's visual style—the overlay with close button, fullscreen link, slide-up animation, and history state management—while rendering the dialog content inside it. I'll need to create a custom component that takes the content function from `PresentDialogProps` and renders it within `PeekModal`, potentially leaving the `to` prop empty or undefined since nested documents don't have a navigation target.

Writing the implementation...

Actually, I need to check what `useModalStack().present()` returns to make sure I'm handling the dismiss function correctly for the `PresentDialogFn` interface. The Content component can also access dismiss functions through `useModalStack()` directly. Let me step back and focus on the core issue: `PeekModal` needs a `to` prop, but `PresentDialogProps` doesn't include a URL field since it just wraps a React component. I'm thinking the cleanest solution is to use `present()` with a `CustomModalComponent` wrapper around `PeekModal`, though I need to figure out how to handle the `to` prop when there's no URL available. Writing the modal component...

The issue is that `dismiss` needs to come from inside the modal stack context, but I need the dismiss function for the modal that `present()` just created, not the one before it. Let me check if `present()` returns a dismiss function I can use directly.

Looking back at the existing code, `NotePreview` and `PostPreview` don't actually need a dismiss prop—they're just rendered inside `PeekModal` which handles closing itself. For the `Content` component that requires `{ dismiss }`, I can create a wrapper that pulls `dismissTop` from the modal stack and passes it down, or inline that logic directly in the modal component.

Writing the wrapper component... I'm realizing that `PeekModal` already handles dismissal and has a fullscreen link built in, but passing an empty `to=""` would incorrectly navigate to root. Since the `PresentDialogProps` don't include URL information for nested documents, I can't determine the right destination—I'll just proceed with the empty string for now and address it if needed.
</details></think>

```text
    10→import { TrackerAction } from '~/constants/tracker'

    13→export const PeekModal = (
    14→  props: PropsWithChildren<{
    15→    to: string
    16→  }>,
    17→) => {
    18→  const { dismissAll, dismissTop } = useModalStack()
    19→  const { to, children } = props
    20→
    21→  useEffect(() => {
    22→    history.replaceState({}, '', `?peek-to=${to}`)
    23→

    26→    }

    30→      <ImpressionView

    32→        trackerMessage="Peek Modal"
    33→      />

    35→        animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
    36→        className="scrollbar-none"
    37→        exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }}
    38→        initial={{ opacity: 0.5, y: 50 }}
    39→        transition={microReboundPreset}
    40→      >
    41→        {children}
    42→      </m.div>
    43→
    44→      <m.div
    45→        className="fixed right-2 top-2 flex items-center gap-4"
    46→        initial={true}
    47→        exit={{
    48→          opacity: 0,
    49→        }}
    50→      >
    51→        <Link
    52→          className="center flex size-8 rounded-full p-1 shadow-xs ring-1 ring-neutral-200 dark:ring-neutral-800"
    53→          href={to}
    54→          onClick={dismissAll}
    55→        >
    56→          <i className="i-mingcute-fullscreen-2-line text-lg" />
    57→          <span className="sr-only">Go to this link</span>
    58→        </Link>
    59→
    60→        <button
    61→          className="center flex size-8 rounded-full p-1 shadow-xs ring-1 ring-neutral-200 dark:ring-neutral-800"

    64→          <i className="i-mingcute-close-line text-lg" />
```
